featureName: BUG-010-003: Browser-history E2E search method drift

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for browser-history E2E GET /api/search drift. No source or parent certification fields modified.

Aligned browser-history E2E search calls to POST /api/search, added stale-GET regression guard, captured focused red/green browser-history E2E evidence, repo check, regression-quality guard, broad E2E browser-history PASS evidence, and explicit test-stack down.

Verified the browser-history POST search contract under the repo E2E command: stale GET guard passed, browser-history search checks completed successfully, and unrelated broad-suite failures were identified outside the browser-history search-method surface.

Validated BUG-010-003 closure from existing focused browser-history E2E evidence and the later c6d2b26 full E2E baseline: browser-history search uses POST /api/search, the stale-GET regression guard passes, and the broad suite no longer reports the browser-history method mismatch.
Audited packet consistency: bug.md, scopes.md, uservalidation.md, report.md, and state.json agree on Fixed/Verified/Closed status with edits confined to the BUG-010-003 packet.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered e2e blocker. Existing BUG-010-001 and BUG-010-002 do not cover this method-contract drift.

Aligned browser-history E2E search calls to POST /api/search, added stale-GET regression guard, captured focused green evidence, check, regression-quality guard, broad E2E browser-history PASS evidence with unrelated Go E2E failures, and explicit test-stack down. Certification fields were not modified by the implement phase.

Verified the changed browser-history E2E contract through repo-supported checks: format and check passed, regression-quality guard passed, browser-history stale-GET guard passed, and live browser-history search checks completed successfully under the broad E2E command. Overall broad E2E exited 1 at this phase from unrelated failures outside BUG-010-003.
Validated closure from existing evidence: focused browser-history E2E red/green proof passed after POST alignment, the stale-GET guard passed, and the c6d2b26 full E2E baseline was green.
Audited packet closeout fields and report evidence formatting before final artifact lint. Edits remained confined to the BUG-010-003 packet.

failures.summary: Browser-history Go E2E used GET /api/search while router exposed POST /api/search before the fix.
